note: golden_hash is empty until first golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1: periods mode, textbook 4-year annuity-style project cash flows discounted at 10%. Vectors 2-4: same dated cash flows under the three declared day-count conventions (30/360, ACT/360, ACT/365) — the CC-G convention matrix.

vectors.name: npv_periods_textbook
vectors.description: Textbook project: -$1,000 initial outlay, $400/yr for 4 years, discounted at 10%.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Standard discounted cash flow NPV, textbook definition (Brealey/Myers Ch.2)
output_payload.note: NPV = sum(CF_t / (1+r)^t). Periods mode: t is a caller-supplied period offset in the rate's own unit. Dates mode: t derived via declared day_count_convention (30/360, ACT/360, ACT/365, ACT/ACT-simplified) from valuation_date. Deterministic pow via Taylor-series exp/ln, no engine transcendentals.

vectors.name: npv_dates_act365
vectors.description: Dated cash flows under ACT/365: -$1,000 at valuation, $600 at +6mo, $600 at +1yr, discounted at 8%.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Standard discounted cash flow NPV, textbook definition (Brealey/Myers Ch.2)
output_payload.note: NPV = sum(CF_t / (1+r)^t). Periods mode: t is a caller-supplied period offset in the rate's own unit. Dates mode: t derived via declared day_count_convention (30/360, ACT/360, ACT/365, ACT/ACT-simplified) from valuation_date. Deterministic pow via Taylor-series exp/ln, no engine transcendentals.

vectors.name: npv_dates_30_360
vectors.description: Same dated cash flows as npv_dates_act365, under the 30/360 convention.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Standard discounted cash flow NPV, textbook definition (Brealey/Myers Ch.2)
output_payload.note: NPV = sum(CF_t / (1+r)^t). Periods mode: t is a caller-supplied period offset in the rate's own unit. Dates mode: t derived via declared day_count_convention (30/360, ACT/360, ACT/365, ACT/ACT-simplified) from valuation_date. Deterministic pow via Taylor-series exp/ln, no engine transcendentals.

vectors.name: npv_dates_act360
vectors.description: Same dated cash flows as npv_dates_act365, under the ACT/360 convention.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Standard discounted cash flow NPV, textbook definition (Brealey/Myers Ch.2)
output_payload.note: NPV = sum(CF_t / (1+r)^t). Periods mode: t is a caller-supplied period offset in the rate's own unit. Dates mode: t derived via declared day_count_convention (30/360, ACT/360, ACT/365, ACT/ACT-simplified) from valuation_date. Deterministic pow via Taylor-series exp/ln, no engine transcendentals.
